game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Jelly Shift - Obstacle Course:** Players control a continuously moving jelly character, swiping up or down on the screen to instantly change its vertical shape between tall/thin and short/wide forms. The core mechanic involves precisely matching the jelly's shape to fit through gaps in an endless series of static and moving obstacles like barriers and bars, without colliding. Each level features a unique obstacle course, with the objective being to reach the finish line in the shortest possible time while collecting diamonds. Successfully navigating multiple obstacles without collision triggers "jelly fever," a temporary speed boost that allows the jelly to complete the current level in approximately half the time. Progression involves clearing a huge number of levels, with 200 obstacle course variations across dozens of environments, and using collected diamonds to unlock new cosmetic jelly characters.
game_info.description: Navigate your jelly character through an endless obstacle course! Change your jelly's shape between tall and short to squeeze through gaps and barriers. Collect diamonds for points and build combos by avoiding obstacles to enter Jelly Fever mode for a speed boost. Reach the finish line of each level to progress. The game gets progressively harder with faster speeds and more complex obstacles.
game_info.controls:
UP ARROW: Change jelly to tall/thin shape
DOWN ARROW: Change jelly to short/wide shape
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and shape changing. Validates that the jelly can change shapes correctly and move forward through the course. Tests collision detection with obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly alternates between tall and short shapes while the jelly moves forward. Tests various shape configurations to ensure collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The jelly should move forward continuously, change shapes in response to inputs, and collision detection should properly register when the jelly hits obstacles. Game should handle collisions correctly by triggering game over.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay strategy to win a level. Validates that the game can be won by making correct shape choices. Tests the complete game loop from start to finish line.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyzes upcoming obstacles and chooses the optimal shape (tall or short) based on gap positions. Predicts obstacle positions ahead of time and changes shape preemptively to fit through gaps. Aims to collect diamonds when safe.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reaches the finish line by avoiding all obstacles through optimal shape changes. Should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Validates that the win condition is achievable and the game mechanics support skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the Jelly Fever combo system. Validates that avoiding obstacles builds combos and triggers the speed boost mode correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focuses on maintaining a perfect run by avoiding all obstacles to build up the combo counter. Once Jelly Fever activates, continues to play optimally to maintain the boost.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully builds combo counter by avoiding obstacles. Jelly Fever should activate after the required number of successful dodges. Speed boost should be noticeable and help complete the level faster.
